title: update banner: announce paid models (ElevenLabs Music/TTS, GPT Image 2)
author: ElliotEtag

gist.headline: Fresh news on the banner
gist.blurb: The homepage banner has been updated with the latest details on our premium model tiers, including ElevenLabs and GPT Image 2.
gist.summary: Updated the news banner to reflect the new premium tiers for ElevenLabs Music, TTS, and GPT Image 2.
gist.impact: Users will now see up-to-date information about premium model access right at the top of the site.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee updating a glowing sign or banner on a retro computer monitor. The sign shows a list of models. Nomnom creature is eating old banner text.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee wearing a tiny painter's beret, painting a new lime green (#ecf874) banner on a retro computer monitor. The round nomnom creature happily eats the old banner text nearby. Soft pastel gradient background. Chunky pixels, warm lighting, lo-fi aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
